docket_entries.description: POS RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL INVESTMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. ORDER GRANTING PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION RE: ENTRY TO INSPECT AND REPAIR UNDER CERTAIN CONDITIONS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Aug-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Order To Show Cause To Defendants John O'Banion And Pamela O'Banion Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Hill Investment Company Order to Show Cause to Defendants John O'Banion and Pamela O'Banion Re: Preliminary Injunction. Appearances: Robert E. Aune, Esq. of Aune & Associates appearing for Plaintiff Hill Investment Company; Alex M. Weyand, Esq. of Weyand Law Firm (415) 536-2800 appearing for Defendants. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Order re: Preliminary Injunction is granted. Order granting Preliminary Injunction re: entry to inspect and repair under certain conditions signed and filed in Open court.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
